title: Library / CLI / SDK
summary: API-first package with no UI. Spec is the public API contract (frozen before implementation); adds semver-breaking check, doc/changelog generation, publish, and a consumer dry-run as the human smoke test.

stages.title: API contract spec
stages.desc: Design + freeze the public surface (the 'schema' here is the type/API signature).

stages.title: Finalize spec
stages.desc: Cross-model audit locks the API contract.

stages.title: Implement
stages.desc: Write the code per plan; review + cross-model audit.

stages.title: Tests + doctests
stages.desc: Unit tests + usage-examples-as-tests across a runtime/platform matrix.

stages.title: Semver breaking check
stages.desc: api-extractor / cargo-semver-checks — catch accidental breaking changes.

stages.title: Consumer dry-run
stages.desc: Install the package as a real consumer and run the quickstart (mandatory).

stages.title: Commit & publish
stages.desc: Conventional commit; then publish to npm/PyPI/crates.

stages.title: Watch issues + adoption
stages.desc: Issue tracker + download metrics + downstream breakage reports.
